title: Aikhibba

'''Aikhibba''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Fei Hu sector/Legends|Fei Hu sector]]. Situated on the [[Gamor Run/Legends|Gamor Run]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]], it had become a part of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] by [[17,000 BBY]], and around that [[Time/Legends|time]], it was also a part of the [[Exploitation Region]] that was controlled by the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]–based [[Merchant/Legends|trading]] conglomerates known as the [[Grand Companies]]. Around the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]], the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Lo Khan]] made a highly profitable smuggling run to Aikhibba, where the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Spadda]] lived, by delivering them a [[Spice/Legends|spice]] shipment from the [[Governor/Legends|royal governor]] of the [[Thokosia system/Legends|Thokosia system]]. 

==Description==
Aikhibba was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Guide">''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]''</ref> located in the [[Aikhibba system/Legends|Aikhibba system]], a part of the [[Fei Hu sector/Legends|Fei Hu sector]]<ref name="EAOC Aikhibba" /> of [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC Aikhibba" /> It was situated on the [[Gamor Run/Legends|Gamor Run]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]], which linked it to the [[Hoylin system/Legends|Hoylin system]] as well as the [[Charra system/Legends|Charra system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
[[File:LoKhan-DE5.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Lo Khan once undertook a highly profitable smuggling run to Aikhibba.]]
Aikhibba was a part of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] by [[17,000 BBY]]. Around that [[Time/Legends|time]], which saw the [[First Alsakan Conflict|beginning]] of a [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]]-long [[Alsakan Conflicts/Legends|series]] of [[Politics/Legends|conflicts]] between the planet [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]]; the Republic's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] world, [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]; and their respective allies, Aikhibba—which was aligned with Coruscant—was situated in the [[Exploitation Region]], which was a territory actively controlled by the [[Grand Companies]]—Coruscant-affiliated [[Merchant/Legends|trading]] conglomerates based along the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] hyperlane known as [[the Spin]].<ref name="EGTW" />

At some point around the time of the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Spadda]] came to live at Aikhibba, and the [[Governor/Legends|royal governor]] of the [[Thokosia system/Legends|Thokosia system]]<ref name="DES">''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref> of the [[Maerdocian sector/Legends|Maerdocian sector]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> once hired the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Uxbeg]] to transport a shipment of [[Spice/Legends|spice]] to the Hutt. Before Uxbeg could pick the cargo up, however, it was intercepted by the smuggler's rival, [[Lo Khan]], who delivered it himself. Upon delivering the cargo to Aikhibba, Khan was surprised to learn that the recipient of the shipment was indeed the crime lord Spadda themselves, and ultimately the smuggler was richly rewarded.<ref name="DES" /> Although Aikhibba was just a minor stop for smugglers on the Gamor Run,<ref name="Guide" /> it was nevertheless a center of smuggling operations, which it remained at least until [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].<ref name="FF123">{{FactFile|123|CRI 1-4|Galactic Organized Crime}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Aikhibba was first mentioned in the ''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'', [[Michael Allen Horne]]'s [[1993]] sourcebook published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="DES" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Aikhibba [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square P-13.<ref name="TEA" />
